sidebar.layout: w-64 fixed left-0 top-0 h-screen border-r border-default bg-app
sidebar.item_active: bg-white text-primary font-medium shadow-sm ring-1 ring-border/50

dashboard_grid.kpi_card: col-span-1 bg-surface border border-default p-6 flex flex-col gap-2 rounded-xl
dashboard_grid.chart_card: col-span-1 md:col-span-2 xl:col-span-3 bg-surface border border-default p-6 rounded-xl
dashboard_grid.list_card: col-span-1 md:col-span-2 xl:col-span-1 bg-surface border border-default p-6 rounded-xl

invoice_table.header: text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-secondary font-semibold bg-app/50 border-y border-default py-3 px-4

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary_hover px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary border border-default hover:bg-subtle px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all

inputs.base: bg-white border border-default text-primary placeholder:text-muted focus:border-focus focus:ring-1 focus:ring-focus transition-all px-3 py-2

motion.stagger_children: Delay transitions by 50ms for list items.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the UI entirely in Spanish.
Ensure all monetary values use JetBrains Mono (monospace font).
Use Shadcn UI components for Tables, Dropdowns, Dialogs, Selects, and Tabs. Customize them strictly according to this JSON (borders, radii, colors).
For the dashboard, use Recharts for the monthly revenue chart. Keep the chart colors monochrome (black bars/lines) with very subtle grid lines.
Include a 'data-testid' attribute on all interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) using kebab-case role-based naming.
The layout must have a persistent Sidebar and a main content area. Content area should have generous padding.
Avoid generic centered text. Left-align most content, especially headers and table data (except numbers, which align right).
For the Invoice creation form, use a split view or a clean top-to-bottom editorial flow. Add a dynamic table for items where rows can be added.
No purple gradients. Stick to the stark, professional Swiss/Editorial aesthetic defined in the palette.
